title: One Hundred Thousand Dollars for Ringo
writer: Alfonso Balcázar, Alberto De Martino, Vincenzo Mannino
actors: Richard Harrison, Fernando Sancho, Luis Induni
plot: A stranger named Lee Barton rides into the western town of Rainbow Valley where he's mistaken for a former resident named Ward Cluster who was believed killed in the Civil War. Cluster's wife Rose is now dead but his young son Sea...
